chapters.title: Hello, JavaScript!
chapters.description: Meet the language that powers the web and start your coding adventure.

chapters.title: Variables & Data Types
chapters.description: Learn to store data with let, const, and var — the building blocks of every program.

chapters.title: Operators & Expressions
chapters.description: Master math, comparisons, and logical thinking to supercharge your code.

chapters.title: Control Flow: If/Else
chapters.description: Teach your programs to make smart decisions with conditional logic.

chapters.title: Loops: For & While
chapters.description: Automate repetitive tasks and bend code to repeat on command.

chapters.title: Functions & Scope
chapters.description: Build reusable code blocks and understand how variables live and die.

chapters.title: Arrays & Objects
chapters.description: Organize your data into powerful collections and key-value structures.

chapters.title: Strings Deep Dive
chapters.description: Slice, search, and transform text like a JavaScript wizard.

chapters.title: DOM & Browser Basics
chapters.description: Bring web pages to life by manipulating HTML elements with JavaScript.

chapters.title: Modern JavaScript (ES6+)
chapters.description: Level up with arrow functions, destructuring, modules, and beyond.
